title: If you were an Eva pilot what would your Eva be like
display_title: If you were an Eva pilot what would your Eva be like
wikitext:
[]: If you were an Eva pilot, what would your Eva be like?             Quote Post by evamoth » Fri Feb 08, 2008 10:38 am mine would have 2 eyes and be black and red oh and spit fire, but no horns or anything.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Feb 08, 2008 11:06 am Mine would have teh laz0rs and shoot them out it's eyes like, PEW PEW PEW PEW PEW PEW PEW PEW!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Fri Feb 08, 2008 1:25 pm Meh...I'm torn as to whether I would want mine to look more like one of TEH HARPIES or a 'prototype' like 00.

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Fri Feb 08, 2008 2:50 pm Mine would be the only pink Eva evar. XD Yus. The body armour would be pink primarily, with white trimming/accents and a little bit of black. Then it would have four eyes, with the tinting there in the mask to make the eyes appear silver (like how they made Unit-02's orange eyes appear green). Finally, it would have two horns, but they would be swept back towards the neck, rather than sticking up like Unit-01's. X3

[]:             Quote Post by evamoth » Fri Feb 08, 2008 3:33 pm lol, fancy XD

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Fri Feb 08, 2008 5:30 pm AsukaChan wrote: Mine would be the only pink Eva evar. XD Yus. The body armour would be pink primarily, with white trimming/accents and a little bit of black. Then it would have four eyes, with the tinting there in the mask to make the eyes appear silver (like how they made Unit-02's orange eyes appear green). Finally, it would have two horns, but they would be swept back towards the neck, rather than sticking up like Unit-01's. X3

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 08, 2008 5:36 pm Like a maths teacher.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 08, 2008 6:03 pm AsukaChan wrote: Mine would be the only pink Eva evar. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Fri Feb 08, 2008 7:23 pm REICHU I ADORE YOU! Yes, that's a horrid abortion from my n00b days...but obviously if there is a demand for pink evas...well, I'll be damned if you all don't see me around here more often. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 08, 2008 7:30 pm There's been a thread similar to this, though not entirely the same. Here And here Personally, my Eva would have 3 main colors. Mostly black, with toxic green stripes (similar to Unit-03), and one red eye (the other being covered, or just knocked out like with Unit-01 in ep 2). But of course a little white here and there. And red teeth. It would also have small green spikes on it's head like a Mohawk. Black gauntlet-looking things. An chains hanging from it's hips, along with suspenders hanging down as well. (Suspenders are my thing).

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Feb 08, 2008 8:01 pm My Eva would have superhuman powers, on a par with Eva 01 but I control it and it would have 2 eyes, a horn, snarling white teeth, and very little armour due to its immense power.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Fri Feb 08, 2008 8:31 pm Ive decided mine is going to look like a phalus. "ZOMG its drawn its fapmaster knife"

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Feb 08, 2008 9:25 pm My Eva would be able to combine with all kinds of stuff. It could combine with larger robots, with enemy robots, with hidden underground spaceships, with astrological bodies, and other things. And it would use all sorts of giant drills for its special attacks. Instead of an S2 engine it would use something I call "spiral energy." Holy crap, this would be an awesome mecha. Wait, I think I've seen one like this before....

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 08, 2008 9:38 pm BrikHaus wrote: Wait, I think I've seen one like this before....

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sat Feb 09, 2008 2:54 am Jet black [or darkblue], white accent, silver visor over eyes, head like the mass produced green soldiers guys from gundam [Gouf?], claymore the size of itself, big angel wings, and a deployable attack monkey.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Feb 09, 2008 2:57 am @Ursus: Um...Well, here's a Panda .

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Feb 09, 2008 4:01 am My Eva would be colored crimson with jet black stripes along hands, legs, chest, and head. My maximum ATF would break a SoL, and would be able to tear organisms trying to physically bond with me. I would have an S^2 organ so I wouldn't need a stupid umbilical wire. All I need is my regenerative power, the ability to fly, and powerful, working limbs >+D

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Sat Feb 09, 2008 5:52 am XD I put a lot of thought into it! ..But I didn't think there would be such a demand for pink Evas! I sort of figured most everyone would go for something more tough looking. ..Though I guess PURPLE and BABY BLUE don't quite qualify as "tough" colours either. X3 Either way.. MINE WOULD BE TEH_COOLEST! 'Cause like, my Eva would've kicked Unit-01's butt! With wonderful strength and yet remain as graceful as a delicate flower~! XD If it wasn't the only pink Evangelion, it would probably be the only lolita evangelion. Maybe I'll tie a big pretty bow to its butt. >D

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sat Feb 09, 2008 11:02 am I think the question is how many of us would be willing to kill our own mothers to put a soul in our evas.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Feb 09, 2008 11:05 am UrsusArctos wrote: You've done this routine once before, haven't you?
